name: wdp-backend
description: Scientific Research Trend Tracking System — Backend API

scripts.dev: cross-env PORT=5001 NODE_ENV=development REDIS_ENABLED=false nodemon src/app.js
scripts.test:unit: cross-env NODE_ENV=test node --test test/ai.service.test.js test/email.service.test.js test/exa.service.test.js test/follow.service.test.js test/followDigest.service.test.js test/paperCleaning.test.js test/sourceMappers.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
